  have h2003_mod7 : 2003 % 7 = 1 := by norm_num
  have hx_mod7 : x ^ 3 ≡ 2 [ZMOD 7] := by
    rwa [Int.modEq_iff_sub_modEq_zero, ← mul_mod_left, h2003_mod7] at h_mod7
  have hx_cubes : ∀ x : ℤ, x ^ 3 % 7 ∈ [0, 1, 6] := by
    intro x
    have := Int.mod_eq_zero_or_lt (x % 7) 7
    interval_cases x % 7 <;> simp [pow_succ', *]
  have hx_contra : x ^ 3 % 7 = 2 := by
    rw [Int.modEq_iff_sub_modEq_zero] at hx_mod7
    exact hx_mod7
  simp [hx_cubes x] at hx_contra
